ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard the Titanic */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard the Titanic */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg; Q = Queenstown; S = Southampton) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger was rescued */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger boarded the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin FOREIGN KEY ("cabin") REFERENCES cabin_details ("cabin_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the class includes */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare for the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passengers */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in that class */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors in that class */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate for the class */,
  "average_age_survivors" REAL /* Average age of survivors in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "code" TEXT /* IATA code for the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number or designation */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class associated with the cabin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cabin amenities */,
  "deck_level" TEXT /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "num_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_details_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary passenger */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, parent) */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Detailed type of relationship (e.g., brother, sister, father, mother) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
column_names: Gender of the passenger (male or female)
